title: taraxacum virellum
intro: Taraxacum virellum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum virellum include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum virellum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its active compounds for medicinal purposes.
